violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Recommend using single service towels instead of cloth wiping cloths when using spray bottles for chemical sanitizers.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Store boxes of cups etc. off floor in upper storage area.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors need cleaning in walk in cooler and upper storage area.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Wood floor in walk in cooler no longer maintained sealed.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
